content:
Dear Connections,

​I'm pleased to share that I have successfully concluded my internship for the month of May 2026 at the High Court Of Judicature at Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, Lucknow - the largest High Court in Asia by strength of judges and caseload. ​During this internship, I had the privilege of working under the guidance of Adv. Shri Umesh Chandra Pandey Ji, who has been in legal profession since 1998 and a dedicated mentor to aspiring lawyers for the past decade.

​This internship provided me with invaluable exposure to the intricacies of High Court litigation and State-level Judicial operations. Transitioning from the relatively informal atmosphere of the district courts, I deep-dived into the rigorous, procedural compliance required at the High Court level. I had the opportunity to sharpen my legal research skills, utilizing industry-standard tools like Manupatra and SCC Online to assist with complex legal matters. ​The firsthand exposure to formal court proceedings has been crucial in building my foundation and understanding of the mechanism of law.

​With the conclusion of this internship, I officially mark the completion of my 1st year of law school. It has been an enriching journey of transitioning from a layman to a lawman, and I look forward to stepping into my 2nd year with greater perspective and determination.

​Thanks for your Valuable Time.
​
​Anupam Mishra
National Law University, 
Aurangabad (CS), Maharashtra
